since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.59%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.66% · Gold +0.45% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.59%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.59%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at -5.11%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +4.73%, EQIX +3.17%, NOW +1.64%, SAP +1.63%, PLTR +1.13%. Laggards: CEVA -5.11%, ARM -4.78%, MU -4.67%, MRVL -3.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.63% at $150.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
